query:
SELECT id, name, status,
  CASE WHEN actionPlansData IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
       WHEN JSON_LENGTH(actionPlansData) = 0 THEN 'EMPTY_OBJECT'
       ELSE CONCAT('HAS_DATA (', JSON_LENGTH(actionPlansData), ' keys)')
  END as action_plans_status,
  CHAR_LENGTH(actionPlansData) as action_plans_length
FROM projects WHERE id = 90003;
command:

  CASE WHEN actionPlansData IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
       WHEN JSON_LENGTH(actionPlansData) = 0 THEN 'EMPTY_OBJECT'
       ELSE CONCAT('HAS_DATA (', JSON_LENGTH(actionPlansData), ' keys)')
  END as action_plans_status,
  CHAR_LENGTH(actionPlansData) as action_plans_length
FROM projects WHERE id = 90003;
